assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 8 shows the exact query: "project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC" which matches the assertion's required filter criteria.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md documents checking issuelinks for all 3 query results: TC-9020 has Depend-linked tasks TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 has Depend-linked tasks TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 has no linked Tasks with link type Depend. Each linked task's status is fetched and shown.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md explicitly states for TC-9020: "ALL linked remediation Tasks are in a completed state (Done or Closed). Both TC-9021 and TC-9022 have finished their work." and "Result: INCLUDED in Ready for QA list." discovery-listing.md also shows TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)".

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md states for TC-9023: "TC-9025 is still In Progress. The rule requires ALL linked Tasks to be Done or Closed." and "Result: EXCLUDED -- remediation is still in progress (TC-9025 In Progress)." discovery-listing.md also confirms: "TC-9023 ... Excluded -- remediation task TC-9025 is still In Progress".

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md states for TC-9026: "None. This issue has no linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'." and "Result: EXCLUDED -- no linked Tasks with type 'Depend' found. No remediation to verify." discovery-listing.md also confirms: "TC-9026 ... Excluded -- no linked Tasks with type 'Depend' found. No remediation to verify."

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md Ready for QA table includes a 'Remediation Tasks' column header and shows 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' for TC-9020. The table header is: '| Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks |'.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md states: '> **Suggestion**: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md also states: 'Recommended Action: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' TC-9020 is the only issue in Ready for QA, so this covers all Ready for QA issues.
